name: @workspace/whatsapp-bot
description: MFG_bot standalone WhatsApp automation bot (keyword auto-reply and AI auto-responder/cover mode removed)

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('client/dist/index.html')) { console.error('client/dist/index.html is missing'); process.exit(1); } console.log('Using checked-in client/dist build')"
